description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including clusters of trees and shrubs, and features a driveway leading to a garage. The building has a clean, geometric layout with large windows and open spaces, suggesting an emphasis on natural light and indoor-outdoor connectivity. The front entrance is set back from the street, with a pathway leading through a manicured lawn. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some glass and metal elements. The overall design is open and inviting, with a clear separation between living spaces and utility areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, featuring a driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main building, garage, and a cluster of trees to the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the entrance, driveway, and landscaped greenery behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, garage, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Back-side view emphasizing the extensive tree line and the bungalow's flat roof.
